description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, ribbed inner neck, and nike swoosh near the hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron on the print Do not dry clean This sunny yellow t-shirt is a production from nike's athletic department. The discreet print of the brand name on the chest in shoe-lace like fonts adds an element of style while the pure cotton fabric keeps you cool and fresh all day. Pair it with ice washed denims and a pair Nike sneakers from the wide collection available at myntra to look your casual best.
